title: Nursery Rhyme. CLXXXVII. Riddles.
content:
[Snuff.]

        As I look'd out o' my chamber window
            I heard something fall;
        I sent my maid to pick it up,
            But she couldn't pick it all.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CLXXXVII. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
